zh.Ashford, Kent, England, Kingdom of Engla: 英國英格蘭肯特阿福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland於1538年出生在英國肯特阿福德時，她的父親John Aspeland18歲，母親Joan Hooper Wedgewood22歲。她於1560年與Reginald Reynold Meade在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年10月6日在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland于1538年出生在英国肯特阿福德时，她的父亲John Aspeland18岁，母亲Joan Hooper Wedgewood22岁。她于1560年与Reginald Reynold Meade在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年10月6日在英国英格兰肯特阿福德享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aspeland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Selmer, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of the five places in western Norway named with Old Norse ask ‘ash tree’ + land ‘land, piece of land’.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland was born in 1538, in Ashford, Kent, England, her father, John Aspeland, was 18 and her mother, Joan Hooper Wedgewood, was 22. She married Reginald Reynold Meade in 1560, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 6 October 1588, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland est née en 1538, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Aspeland, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joan Hooper Wedgewood, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald Reynold Meade en 1560, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 octobre 1588, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland 1538 in Ashford, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Aspeland 18 und ihre Mutter Joan Hooper Wedgewood 22. Sie hat 1560 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Reginald Reynold Meade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Oktober 1588 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland è nata il nel 1538 nel Ashford, Kent, England, sua padre, John Aspeland, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Joan Hooper Wedgewood, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Reginald Reynold Meade nel 1560, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 6 ottobre 1588, nel Ashford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara Elizabeth Aspelandが1538年にイギリスケントアシュフォードで生まれた時，父John Aspelandは18歳，母Joan Hooper Wedgewoodは22歳であった。1560年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでReginald Reynold Meadeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年10月6日にイギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland(이)가 1538년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Aspeland(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Hooper Wedgewood(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Reginald Reynold Meade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 10월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland nasceu em 1538, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Aspeland, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hooper Wedgewood, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald Reynold Meade em 1560, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1588, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland родилась в 1538 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Aspeland было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hooper Wedgewood, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald Reynold Meade в 1560 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 6 октября 1588 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland nació en 1538, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Aspeland, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Joan Hooper Wedgewood, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Reginald Reynold Meade en 1560, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1588, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
